headline: Founder & CEO at Taggify | Business Leader in Programmatic DOOH
summary:
At the helm of Taggify as CEO since 2017, I focus on leveraging programmatic digital out-of-home (DOOH) technology to transform advertising. With over 8 years of leadership, my work integrates marketing management and business strategy to deliver innovative digital advertising solutions across diverse channels and locations.

Taggify's vision revolves around creating engaging, personalized consumer experiences while expanding global reach. Supported by skills in marketing and business strategy, I am committed to advancing impactful advertising solutions that drive results and enhance audience engagement.
location_str: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina

experiences.company: Asociación Argentina de Editores de Revistas
experiences.title: President

volunteer_work.title: Editor
volunteer_work.company: Asociación Argentina de Editores de Revistas
volunteer_work.description: As President of this Association we have edited a Magazine called RE, to give away for free all through high school in Argentina, reaching every month (school calendar) 250.000 students in Argentina. The idea was to discuss important articles in class and make them participate in interesting matters, and take magazines to homes that were not able to by them. We have done this with the help of many important companies and the strong support of Ministerio de Educación de La Nación.

recommendations:
Diego Majdalani

Santiago is the kind of professionals really hard to find. He has an amazing balance betwen the drive of an extraoirdinary sales leader with the credibility you can trust to run a full business. He has always stretched reality to make things happen even in the toughest environments he find way to solve corporate needs, by generating new revenue streams, while keeping the ethical standards even in very tough markets. It is a pleasure to get to know him and work with him. A true one of a kind.

Pedro Placoná

When talking about Santiago you might think of an energizing leader. His strong personal qualities give to his team the availability to say "impossible is nothing". His personal qualities made him a very strong/positive recommended leader. In addition not only top but also bottom lines are always in his radar, allowing him to close sound businesses.I would recommend Santiago not only due to his knowledge but due to his team working abilities and positive leadership approach which will always allow him to over.deliver any assignment brought.
